Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DIASPORA CO. LLC.'s Motion To Set Aside Default.

Off calendar as moot. Parties stipulated to vacate the default.

Judge: Richard C. Darwin, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RCD)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:27am and concluding at 9:34am.

Plaintiff Keep America Safe and Beautiful appearing represented by Brian Johnson Esq., via zoom.
Defendant Diaspora Co. LLC not appearing.

Mr. Johnson stated the parties have a stipuation to set aside the default in this matter. The request to vacate the default in this matter is GRANTED.

Defendant has until May 1, 2026 to file an answer in this matter.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To Apr-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Keep America Safe and Beautiful appearing represented by Brian Johnson, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant Disaspora Co. LLC appearing represented by David Kwasniewski via zoom.

Mr. Johnson was informed this department did not receive any courtesy copies of the relevant documents prior to this hearing.

This matter is continued to April 3, 2026 at 9:00am to allow the Plaintiff an oppertunity to send courtesy copies.
